blueprints.conversionPurpose: Open with the product promise and route new or returning users correctly.
blueprints.visualJob: Make the product feel real through a strong hero image and direct start action.
blueprints.composition: Mobile-first vertical layout, centered title, stable content area, bottom CTA when needed.

blueprints.conversionPurpose: Create anonymous identity after the first real answer and make the start visual and low friction.
blueprints.visualJob: Make the first answer visual and low friction.
blueprints.composition: Mobile-first vertical layout, centered title, stable content area, bottom CTA when needed.

blueprints.conversionPurpose: Collect a meaningful personalization signal while increasing confidence in the paid plan.
blueprints.visualJob: Collect multiple personalization signals without forcing decorative icons.
blueprints.composition: Mobile-first vertical layout, centered title, stable content area, bottom CTA when needed.

blueprints.conversionPurpose: Collect a meaningful personalization signal while increasing confidence in the paid plan.
blueprints.visualJob: Capture body baseline through large numeric input and unit conversion.
blueprints.composition: Mobile-first vertical layout, centered title, stable content area, bottom CTA when needed.

blueprints.conversionPurpose: Show that the user's answers are being used before monetization.
blueprints.visualJob: Prove previous answers are used through computed rows, BMI, and body-state visual.
blueprints.composition: Mobile-first vertical layout, centered title, stable content area, bottom CTA when needed.

blueprints.conversionPurpose: Reveal the expected path and move into monetization with confidence.
blueprints.visualJob: Bridge result to paywall with a believable animated progress path.
blueprints.composition: Mobile-first vertical layout, centered title, stable content area, bottom CTA when needed.

blueprints.conversionPurpose: Convert users with personalized proof, real offers, Stripe checkout, app screenshots, and subscription reassurance.
blueprints.visualJob: Convert with personalized proof, offer selection, checkout, and reassurance.
blueprints.composition: Vertical sales page with sticky countdown, comparison, offers, proof, FAQ, and full-screen checkout route.
